name: aiarmada/feedback
description: Core feedback, survey, response, invitation, analytics, and testimonial package for AI Armada applications.

suggest.aiarmada/filament-feedback: Admin panel adapter for managing feedback forms and responses.
suggest.aiarmada/events: Attach feedback forms to events, occurrences, sessions, speakers, and venues.
suggest.aiarmada/certificates: React to feedback submission before issuing certificates.
suggest.aiarmada/engagement: Publish approved testimonials and public review summaries.
